name: cv-generator
description: JSON-driven build for the engineering CV template

scripts.dev: concurrently -n watch,serve,export -c blue,green,magenta "npm run watch" "live-server --port=3000 --watch=content,components,templates,index.html,scripts/app.js,style.css,profile.css,stat-card.css,timeline.css,impact.css,skills.css,portfolio.css,tools.css,cover.css,app.css,print.css,assets --wait=500" "npm run export-server"
scripts.start: npm run build && npm run dev
